message: The start gun has been fired on Maven Grace Race 6. Seven features on the build list. All vault specs read. Full autonomy engaged.
All vault specs read and codebase state mapped. Three degradation specs, battery UI spec, community credits research, and existing schema all reviewed. Build plan locked.

Database schema done. Six new tables created: grace_status, community_credits, community_credits_log, payday_patterns, crisis_beacons, destiny_moonshots. Vera the Real One seeded into the Village. Migration applied clean.

All backend routers compiling clean. Seven new router sections: graceStatus with 5-tier degradation and battery calculation, communityCredits with Big Mama earn and redeem, payday with pattern detection, crisisBeacon with Vera and Big Mama activation, destinyMoonshot with LLM synthesis, graceAmbient with nudge generation. TypeScript zero errors.

Grace Battery persistent UI component built. Dual indicator on every screen: battery top-left with teal-amber-orange-red-empty color states, dignity score top-right with gray-blue-teal-purple-gold states. Tap battery opens Grace Status modal. Tap dignity navigates to Dignity Score page. Empty battery shows heart inside. Engagement brightens with CSS brightness filter.

Five new pages built: Community Credits with Big Mama earn and redeem, Payday Setup with frequency picker, Crisis Beacon with I'm Not Okay button and Vera's message, Grace Status with tier visualization, Moonshot Reveal with confetti ceremony. All compiling clean.
All frontend wiring done. BottomNav updated with 5 new entries. GraceBattery component renders on every screen. All routes registered in App.tsx. TypeScript zero errors.

All 88 tests passing across 7 test files. 20 new Race 6 tests covering Grace Status degradation, Community Credits earn and redeem, Payday Pattern setup, Crisis Beacon activation and resolution, Destiny Moonshot readiness and reveal, Grace Ambient nudges, and Battery integration.

Race 6 is complete. Seven features shipped. Grace Battery lives on every screen. The degradation architecture is built with love and anxiety, not punishment. Vera the Real One is in the Village. Big Mama keeps the credits. The Moonshot Reveal ceremony is ready. 88 tests passing. Checkpoint saved. Deploying now.
